title: Enderchest
description: tired of accidently breaking your enderchest without silktouch? this mod fixes that!
body:
## Tired of accidentily breaking your enderchest without silktouch? ### This mod fixes that problem! This lightweight mod prevents you from breaking enderchests without silktouch. You can toggle it ingame with: ```/togglesilktouchenderchest```
Spoiler **Ill try my best to continue updating this mod.**
